CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment, In Enforcement Of Settlement; Declaration Of Lauren M. Gibbs; Declaration Of Jason Bishop; Proposed Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lauren Gibbs, Esq., 818-630-7300, appearing for Plaintiff Strategic Funding Source, Inc.,(CourtCall)
Adam Bousiakis, 415-725-3001, appearing on his own behalf as pro per Defendant;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STRATEGIC FUNDING SOURCE, INC'S Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment, In Enforcement Of Settlement.

Plaintiff's Strategic Funding Source, Inc.'s motion to enforce settlement and enter stipulated judgment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted. The statutory requirements are satisfied and the motion is unopposed.

Judgment is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
